Neighborhood · Orange County · Updated June 2026

Restaurants in Restaurant Row

61%Grade A
4.4Avg rating
18Restaurants

Restaurant Row is a dining district in Orange County, Central Florida. Explore its 18 restaurants below with health inspection grades, dietary options, and diner ratings — 11 currently hold an A health grade.
